# Decision Table Template (SSOT)

> ルール: この表が唯一の真実（SSOT）。表にないケースは Fallback Rule に従う。

| Condition Group | Error Category / Exception | Context | Attempt < Max | Decision | Strategy Ref | Notes |

| [GROUP]        | [CATEGORY/EXC]             | [CTX]   | Yes/No        | [ACTION] | [STRATEGY]   | [WHY] |
